data.title: Visa Taps Yellow Card for Stablecoin Payments Push Across 20 African Nations
data.description:
Stablecoin payments have entered the mainstream in Africa after Visa has joined forces with Yellow Card to deliver USDC-based transfers across the continent. Circle’s pact with Onafriq and evolving regulations have underlined growing demand for cheaper, dollar-backed digital rails.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/visa-yellow-card-stablecoin-payments-africa/

data.title: Fed, ECB lose policy control as oil prices surge and Trump prepares for war with Iran
data.description:
The Federal Reserve and European Central Bank are both losing control over monetary policy as oil prices shoot up and President Donald Trump moves the US closer to war with Iran. What used to be clear decisions by central banks are now overshadowed by politics, inflation, and a collapsing framework of economic rules. Markets don’t […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fed-ecb-oil-prices-trump-war-with-iran/

data.title: XAO DAO introduces first-ever governance system for XRP Ledger grant allocations
data.description:
XAO DAO has announced plans to launch the first decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) on the XRP Ledger. The Wyoming-based limited liability company (LLC) disclosed this on X, noting that it will bring a new era of decentralized innovation. According to the announcement, XAO DAO is a next-generation governance engine for the XRPL network that will […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/xao-dao-introduces-first-ever-governance-system-for-xrp-ledger-grant-allocations/

data.title: European Stocks Experience Short-Term Decline as Key Indices Fall
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European stocks saw a short-term decline with significant drops in major indices. The German DAX index and Italy's FTSE MIB index both fell by over 1%, indicating a notable downturn in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin's Potential to Surpass Gold's Market Value, Says Mexican Billionaire
data.description: According to PANews, Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas has expressed optimism about Bitcoin's future, suggesting that the cryptocurrency could surpass gold's market value of $16 trillion. Salinas believes that Bitcoin has the potential to grow eightfold from its current level, indicating a significant increase in its market capitalization.

data.title: Trump's Company Reduces Stake in WLFI, Potentially Earning Significant Profits
data.description:
According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump's company, DT Marks DEFI LLC, has reduced its stake in WLFI from 60% to 40% over the past 11 days. This marks the second time the Trump family has decreased its holdings in the project. Earlier this year, at the end of January, their stake was reduced from an initial 75% to 60%.

Based on the recent valuation of stablecoin issuer Circle, WLFI's estimated value could reach $1.7 billion. This reduction in shares might yield approximately $190 million in profits for the Trump family, with Donald Trump himself potentially receiving around $135 million.

data.title: Elon Musk's Vision for X: A Comprehensive Super App
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk plans to transform X into a 'super app' that will encompass a variety of features, including investment and trading capabilities. Additionally, X is exploring the integration of credit or debit card functionalities, as reported by the Financial Times.

data.title: Wintermute Warns Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Poses Attack Risk
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 19, 2025- Cryptocurrency trading firm Wintermute is warning that the recent Pectra upgrade for the Ethereum blockchain could expose users to increased risks from automated attacks. The firm stated Tuesday that the upgrade’s new features might make users more vulnerable to malicious actors. The Pectra upgrade, which combines the Dencun and Electra […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/wintermute-warns-ethereum-pectra-upgrade-poses-attack-risk

data.title: 30% of Bitcoin could be ‘lost forever’ by 2035 – Why that’s a big deal
data.description:
Scarcity is growing, coins are vanishing. Can Bitcoin’s unique supply curve disrupt traditional market expectations?

data.title: Ethereum Bullish Wave Towards ATH Coming? Here Are The Targets
data.description:
Recent price action in the past 24 hours has seen Ethereum clawing back above $2,500 after a pullback that saw its price fall to a low of $2,440. This is a notable correction from Ethereum’s foray to $2,770 in the past seven-day timeframe, but according to crypto analyst KledjdiCuni, it aligns with one of the anticipated price scenarios. Now, the analyst’s outlook is of a reversal into a bullish wave. In his latest update, KlejdiCuni laid out several upside targets that traders may want to keep in focus if Ethereum confirms a breakout
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-bullish-wave-to-ath/

data.description:
Pantera and Multicoin Capital lead the funding for startup creating peer-to-peer protocols Lattica and Parallax, aiming to distribute AI computing across everyday devices.
source: https://decrypt.co/326140/ai-infrastructure-firm-gradient-bags-10-million-to-develop-protocols-on-solana

data.title: World Liberty Financial Ownership Shake-Up: Trump Family Cuts Stake During Stablecoin Push
data.description:
The Trump family has quietly pared DT Marks DEFI LLC’s stake in World Liberty Financial to about 40%, following earlier cuts from 75% and 60%. Forbes estimates the sale could yield $190 million, while disclosures show Trump has collected $57. 4 million from token and stablecoin income
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/world-liberty-financial-ownership-shake-up-trump-family-cuts-stake-during-stablecoin-push/

data.title: IMF tips the euro to play larger role in global economy
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund’s (IMF) Managing Director, Kristalina Georgieva, wants the euro to play a larger role in the global economy, particularly as a reserve currency and a tool for enhancing Europe’s economic resilience. Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva was in Luxembourg on Thursday, where she delivered remarks at the Eurogroup Meeting on Enhancing Competitiveness and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/imf-tips-euro-larger-role-in-global-economy/

data.title: Elon Musk’s X accelerates fintech pivot with plans for in-app payments and trading
data.description:
X (formerly known as Twitter) is ramping up efforts to integrate financial services directly into its ecosystem and moving beyond its roots in social networking, the Financial Times reported on June 19.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/elon-musks-x-accelerates-fintech-pivot-with-plans-for-in-app-payments-and-trading/

data.title: Kraken Debuts Bitcoin Staking Through BABY Tokens

source: https://decrypt.co/326092/kraken-debuts-bitcoin-staking-through-baby-tokens

data.title: The Telegram Collectibles Boom Is Web3 Gaming’s Next Big Play
data.description:
Back in 2008, Facebook changed the gaming industry overnight. Games like FarmVille and Mafia Wars went from zero to millions of players thanks to frictionless distribution, viral mechanics, and built-in social hooks.   But the window closed quickly, and only a few saw it coming. Today, we’re at a similar inflection point
source: https://beincrypto.com/telegram-collectibles-web3-gaming-growth/
